title: Facebook Group Posts & All Photos Scraper
description: Scrape public Facebook group posts as clean, agent-ready JSON. Each result is one post with text, timestamp, author data, engagement, stable post URL, and all recoverable photo URLs. The Actor expands Facebook photo sets hidden behind +N grids, adds media quality flags for suspicious rows, and supports monitoring plus 1,000-post backfill chunks with cursor continuation for larger 5,000+ datasets. Public groups only; no private/login-only content, comments expansion, image downloads, or video guarantee.

groupUrls.title: Facebook group URLs
groupUrls.description: Required. Public Facebook group URLs, vanity URLs, or numeric group IDs. Use group URLs only, not post URLs, Marketplace URLs, or private/login-only groups. Up to maxGroupsPerRun groups are processed inside one Actor run.

maxGroupsPerRun.title: Max groups per run
maxGroupsPerRun.description: Maximum number of groupUrls to process in one Actor run. Extra group URLs are skipped and listed in SUMMARY.skippedGroupUrls.

maxPostsPerGroup.title: Max posts per group
maxPostsPerGroup.description: Maximum number of post results to return per group. For deep historical backfills, run up to 1,000 posts, store SUMMARY.pointer.nextCursor, then continue with startCursor.

sortMode.title: Sort mode
sortMode.description: Facebook group feed sort mode. New posts first is the best fit for latest-post collection and daily monitoring.

expandAllPhotos.title: Expand all photos
expandAllPhotos.description: Recover photo URLs hidden behind Facebook +N grids when publicly available. Keep enabled for complete media rows; disable only for faster preview-only runs.

includeRawPayload.title: Include raw payload
includeRawPayload.description: Include the raw parsed Facebook payload in each dataset row. Useful for debugging, but makes output much larger.

sinceDate.title: Since date
sinceDate.description: Optional monitoring boundary. With New posts first sorting, the Actor stops when posts older than this date are reached.

knownPostIds.title: Known post IDs
knownPostIds.description: Post IDs already stored by your pipeline. With New posts first sorting, the Actor stops when it reaches one of them. Best for daily monitoring.

checkpoint.title: Checkpoint
checkpoint.description: Checkpoint object from a previous SUMMARY. Use it for incremental monitoring or per-group continuation when your pipeline stores run state.

startCursor.title: Start cursor
startCursor.description: Cursor from SUMMARY.pointer.nextCursor. Use it for older-post historical backfills only. Do not use yesterday's cursor to collect newer posts.

startCursorsByGroup.title: Start cursors by group
startCursorsByGroup.description: Optional map of group URL to GraphQL cursor for older-page backfill in multi-group runs. Prefer passing the previous SUMMARY/checkpoint when available.

paginationMode.title: Pagination mode
paginationMode.description: Ranked snapshot collects candidates and sorts locally by creation time. Cursor page preserves feed cursor order, emits a next pointer, and is recommended for monitoring or backfills.

maxCandidates.title: Max candidate posts
maxCandidates.description: Candidate posts collected before local sorting. Use 0 for automatic candidate budget based on Max posts per group.

maxPages.title: Max GraphQL pages
maxPages.description: Maximum GraphQL pagination requests after the public group bootstrap. Use 0 for automatic page budget based on Max posts per group.

bootstrapRetries.title: Bootstrap retries
bootstrapRetries.description: How many fresh proxy/session bootstrap attempts to try if Facebook returns a poor or login-walled public group page.

graphqlPageRetries.title: GraphQL page retries
graphqlPageRetries.description: Retry count for transient empty/small GraphQL pagination responses.

mediaSetRetries.title: Photo-set retries
mediaSetRetries.description: Retry count for each Facebook media/set request.

mediaExpansionConcurrency.title: Photo expansion concurrency
mediaExpansionConcurrency.description: How many posts can expand Facebook media/set pages in parallel. Higher values can speed up all-photos runs but may increase transient Facebook/proxy failures.

mediaExpansionAdaptive.title: Adaptive photo expansion
mediaExpansionAdaptive.description: When enabled, the Actor can lower high photo expansion concurrency back to the stable level if recent media/set expansion quality degrades.

mediaDeferredRetry.title: Deferred photo retry
mediaDeferredRetry.description: Retry only suspicious photo-set rows after the main pass, before final dataset output. This improves +N coverage at a small extra runtime cost.

mediaDeferredRetryConcurrency.title: Deferred retry concurrency
mediaDeferredRetryConcurrency.description: How many suspicious posts to retry in parallel during the deferred photo retry pass.

mediaDeferredRetryExtraRetries.title: Deferred retry extra attempts
mediaDeferredRetryExtraRetries.description: Additional retry attempts for suspicious media/set rows during the deferred pass.

mediaDeferredRetryDelayMs.title: Deferred retry delay
mediaDeferredRetryDelayMs.description: Base delay for the deferred photo retry pass.

debug.title: Debug output
debug.description: Include response samples and discovery details in SUMMARY. Leave off for normal production runs.

discoverBundles.title: Discover doc_id in JS bundles
discoverBundles.description: Fetch Facebook JS bundles to discover the current GraphQL doc_id. Costs extra transfer; fallback doc_id is tried either way.
